hero.headline: Your Pool, Serviced Right Every Single Week
hero.subheadline: Precision Pools is Tampa's trusted family-owned pool service. We guarantee weekly visits with photo reports after every stop — so you always know your pool is in perfect shape. No skipped weeks, no guesswork, just dive in.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool Care From a<br class="hidden md:block"> Team That Shows Up Every Week
services.subtitle: From weekly maintenance to emergency storm cleanup, Precision Pools handles it all. You get a photo report after every visit so your pool is never a mystery.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Cleaning
cards.description: Full-service weekly maintenance — skimming, brushing, vacuuming, and chemical balancing. Every visit includes a photo report so you always know your pool's status.

cards.title: Equipment Repairs
cards.description: Pumps, heaters, filters, and drains — we diagnose and fix it fast. Same-day service available to keep your pool running without downtime.

cards.title: Green-to-Blue Recovery
cards.description: Neglected or algae-filled pool? We'll bring it back to crystal-clear blue with our specialized treatment. Tampa humidity is no match for Precision.

cards.title: Commercial Pool Service
cards.description: Hotels, resorts, and property managers trust us for reliable weekly maintenance. Owner-supervised quality assurance on every commercial account.

cards.title: Acid Wash & Filter Cleaning
cards.description: Deep cleaning services including acid washing of pool surfaces and thorough filter cleaning to restore filtration efficiency and that fresh-pool look.

cards.title: After-Storm Pool Cleanup
cards.description: Florida storms hit hard. We respond fast — removing debris, rebalancing chemicals, and getting your pool back to safe, swimmable condition quickly.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Worry-Free Pool

steps.title: Book Your Free Inspection
steps.description: Tell us about your pool and schedule your free 21-point inspection. We'll assess everything and give you an honest, no-pressure quote — usually within 24 hours.

steps.title: We Show Up Every Week
steps.description: Our CPO-certified team arrives on schedule, every single week. Cleaning, chemicals, equipment checks — all handled. You get a photo report after every visit.

steps.title: Enjoy a Perfect Pool
steps.description: Your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready, guaranteed. If you're ever not satisfied, we come back and make it right — no questions asked, no extra charge.

about.label: Why Tampa Trusts Precision Pools
about.headline: Family-Owned, Owner-Operated, and We Never Skip a Stop
about.description: Founded by Griffin Shahmanesh right here in Tampa, Precision Pools was built on one simple idea: treat every customer's pool like it's our own. We're not a franchise or a call center — when you hire us, you get a hands-on owner who personally oversees every job. That's why hotels, resorts, and hundreds of Tampa homeowners trust us with their pools week after week.

features.title: No-Skipped-Stops Guarantee
features.description: Your pool gets serviced every single week, guaranteed. Rain or shine, holidays included. We never skip a visit — that's our promise to every client.

features.title: No Contracts. Cancel Anytime.
features.description: We earn your business every visit. No long-term commitments, no cancellation fees, no surprises. Stay because you want to, not because you have to.

features.title: Photo Reports Every Visit
features.description: After every service, you get a photo and full condition report. You'll always know exactly what was done and how your pool looks — even when you're not home.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. Zero Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Pick the plan that fits your pool. Upgrade, downgrade, or cancel anytime — no contracts, no hidden fees.

guarantee.headline: Our "Never Skip, Always Perfect" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're not 100% satisfied with any service visit, we'll come back and redo it at no charge. And we guarantee your pool gets serviced every single week — no skipped stops, no excuses. If we ever miss a scheduled visit, your next service is on us. That's the Precision Pools promise.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start weekly service?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are on the schedule within 3-5 business days. For green pool emergencies or storm cleanup, we offer same-day response. Call us at 813-338-3998 and we'll get you started fast.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during service?
faqs.answer: Not at all! Most of our Tampa clients give us gate access and we handle everything while you're out. You'll receive a photo report and full pool condition update after every visit so you always know what was done.

faqs.question: What does the free 21-point inspection cover?
faqs.answer: We check every major pool component — pump, filter, heater, drains, water chemistry, surface condition, tile, skimmer baskets, and more. It's a full diagnostic of your pool's health, and it's completely free with your initial service.

faqs.question: What if I want to cancel?
faqs.answer: Cancel anytime with zero fees. We don't do contracts because we believe in earning your business every single week. No cancellation penalties, no guilt trips — just honest service.

faqs.question: Do you handle commercial pools?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We're trusted by hotels, resorts, and property management companies across Tampa. Commercial clients get owner-supervised quality assurance and reliable weekly service they can count on.

testimonials.name: Gilberto G.
testimonials.text: Highly recommend Griffin and his team for any of your pool service needs. Professional, reliable, and my pool has never looked better since switching to Precision Pools.

testimonials.name: WJS
testimonials.text: Griffin is reliable, polite and efficient. He is very accommodating and pays attention to detail. Our pool always looks amazing after every visit.

testimonials.name: Brianna P.
testimonials.text: Extremely professional and great work! Would highly recommend Precision Pool. They show up every week without fail and our pool has never been cleaner.
